question: How did you implement JWT access and refresh token flow across IQTech client projects?
answer: We implemented JWT access and refresh token flow across IQTech client projects by extending patterns already proven in @iqtech/ui-core. The implementation leaned on JWT, Redux with TypeScript types shared across repos. Feature teams copied the reference implementation instead of inventing local variants. Protected routes and JWT refresh handling ensured JWT access and refresh token flow never leaked data across tenant boundaries. Shared @iqtech/ui-core components meant JWT access and refresh token flow looked different per client theme but behaved the same under RBAC checks.
